signals.raw:
JD Vance publicly urges Elon Musk to stay loyal to Trump's Republican Party and abandon third-party plans amid feud tensions | NO | MED confidence**

Vice President **JD Vance** advised **Elon Musk** to remain within the **Republican** Party rather than launching a third party, stating Musk could exert more influence by fixing it from the inside and staying loyal to **Trump**'s MAGA movement[1][3]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI Released: Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI Released: Annual Inflation Rises to 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual consumer price inflation increased to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, with monthly inflation at 0.34%, as reported in the latest official data.[2]  
This uptick follows steady February readings at 2.0% YoY amid government food price controls, but core inflation rose
